RECKON MORTGAGE, LLC NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT, SALE, OR TRANSFER OF SERVICING RIGHTS NOTICE & DISCLAIMER This Notice of Assignment, Sale, or Transfer of Servicing Rights is provided to Borrower(s) in connection with loan number 123456789 secured by the property located at 123 Main St, Yourtown, KY 40201. The terms of this notice are governed by applicable federal and state laws. This notice explains the servicing your loan may receive after the transfer is completed. This Notice should not be considered a solicitation or offer to new loan terms or conditions. 1. PURPOSE OF THIS NOTICE You are receiving this Notice because the servicing of your mortgage loan, that is, the rights to receive and process your scheduled payments of principal, interest, and any other amounts, is being assigned, sold, or transferred. This notice is being sent to you to notify you of these rights regarding your loan with Rocket Mortgage, LLC. The transfer of servicing rights may not affect your mortgage payment amount, your interest rate, or the terms of your loan in any way. 2. WHAT SERVICING MEANS The term servicing refers to the activities handling and processing of our mortgage loan after closing. A servicer is the entity responsible for collecting your monthly payments and providing you with customer service related to your mortgage. The servicer is responsible for maintaining the loan account and managing your loan on behalf of the loan holder. 3. TRANSFER OF YOUR SERVICING Effective ten (10) days after this notice is sent, the servicing of your loan will be transferred to Rocket Mortgage, LLC. The specific date on which the transfer will occur will be communicated to you in a separate letter from Rocket Mortgage, LLC. 4. Nonaffiliates are companies not related to us by common ownership or control, and they can also include
both financial and nonfinancial companies. Rocket Mortgage, LLC does not share your personal
information with nonaffiliates so that they can market their own products and services to you, except as
permitted or required by law. Where the law would otherwise permit such sharing, we provide you the
opportunity to limit it as described in the section of this notice addressing your choices.
We may, however, disclose your personal information to nonaffiliates in order to carry out our everyday
business purposes, including to investors and purchasers in connection with the sale, transfer,
securitization, or servicing of your loan, and to service providers acting on our behalf. We may also
disclose information to nonaffiliates as necessary to complete or service the transactions you request, to
comply with legal process, and to protect our rights and property. Such disclosures are made consistent
with applicable law and the confidentiality safeguards described in this notice.
7. JOINT MARKETING ARRANGEMENTS
A joint marketing arrangement is a formal agreement between nonaffiliated financial companies that
together market financial products or services to you. Rocket Mortgage, LLC may share your personal
information with other financial companies with which we have such agreements in order to jointly offer
financial products or services that may be of interest to you. We enter into joint marketing arrangements
only with companies that agree by contract to use the information solely for the purposes of the joint
marketing and to protect the confidentiality and security of your information.
Retain this document with your loan file records.

Federal law does not give you the right to limit sharing for joint marketing of financial products and
services, although you may have the right under applicable law to opt out of receiving certain marketing
communications. If you prefer not to receive marketing offers resulting from a joint marketing
arrangement, you may contact us using the information provided at the end of this notice, and we will
take reasonable steps to honor your preference within the time permitted by law.
8. YOUR CHOICES AND HOW TO LIMIT SHARING
If you are a new customer, we may begin sharing your information for the purposes described in this
notice on the day we send it to you. When you are no longer our customer, we continue to share your
information as described in this notice, subject to applicable law. You may, however, contact us at any
time to limit the categories of sharing for which the law gives you a right to opt out, including the sharing
of certain credit information among our affiliates for their marketing purposes and, where applicable,
sharing with nonaffiliates so that they may market to you.
To exercise your choices, please call us at +1-302-788-0024x2252 or write to us at 1470 Leon Divide,
Lake Zacharymouth, GU 09645, and include your name, your loan number 6936688813, and a
description of the sharing you wish to limit. Please allow a reasonable processing period of
approximately thirty (30) days after we receive your request for your election to take effect. Your choice
will remain in effect until you notify us otherwise. If you have already made an opt-out election with us,
you need not act again unless you wish to change your prior election.
If you hold this account jointly with another person, your opt-out election will be applied to all joint
account holders unless you instruct us otherwise, to the extent permitted by law. Limiting sharing for
marketing purposes will not affect the disclosures we make in order to run our everyday business, to
service your account, or to comply with our legal and regulatory obligations.
9. HOW WE PROTECT YOUR INFORMATION
To protect your personal information from unauthorized access and use, we maintain physical, electronic,
and procedural safeguards that comply with applicable federal and state standards. These measures
include computer safeguards, secured files and buildings, access controls, and employee training
designed to limit access to your information to those who need it to provide products and services to
you or to otherwise carry out their responsibilities. We periodically review and update our safeguards as
technology and risks change.
We restrict access to your nonpublic personal information to employees, agents, and service providers
who have a legitimate business need for it, and we require those parties to maintain the confidentiality
and security of the information. When we engage third parties to perform services on our behalf, we
obtain contractual commitments that they will protect your information and use it only for authorized
purposes. Despite these efforts, no system of safeguards can be guaranteed to be completely secure,
and we encourage you to protect your account credentials and to notify us promptly of any suspected
unauthorized activity.
Retain this document with your loan file records.

10. INFORMATION FOR FORMER CUSTOMERS
Even after you cease to be a customer of Rocket Mortgage, LLC, we continue to maintain and protect
your personal information in accordance with this notice and applicable law. We retain your information
for as long as necessary to service the loan during its life, to comply with our legal, regulatory, and
recordkeeping obligations, to resolve disputes, and to enforce our agreements. The protections and the
sharing practices described in this notice continue to apply to former customers to the same extent that
